questions.q: In 'Dasavathaaram' (2008), Kamal Haasan played this many roles simultaneously.
Kamal Haasan's production company, which he founded in 1984, bears this name.
This 1987 Mani Ratnam film starring Kamal Haasan as a Mumbai don was inspired by 'The Godfather' and made TIME Magazine's All-Time 100 Best Films list.
Kamal Haasan played an undercover RAW agent in this 2013 spy thriller which he also partially composed music for.
Which landmark 1975 K. Balachander film introduced both Kamal Haasan and Rajinikanth to Tamil cinema in significant roles?
